"""Domain enumerations."""
from enum import Enum


class FeedLifecycleStatus(str, Enum):
    """Feed lifecycle status."""

"""Base contract types."""
from typing import Any, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, field_validator


class APIResponse(BaseModel):
    """Standard API response envelope."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)
    
    success: bool
    data: Optional[Any] = None
    error: Optional[str] = None
    correlation_id: Optional[str] = None

"""Domain error types."""


class NotFoundError(Exception):
    """Resource not found error."""
    def __init__(self, resource_type: str, resource_id: str):
        self.resource_type = resource_type
        self.resource_id = resource_id
        super().__init__(f"{resource_type} not found: {resource_id}")

"""
Shared pytest fixtures for all test modules.

Provides:
- Correlation ID generation
- Mock loggers with structured logging
- Mock database connections
- Mock artifact storage
- Common test data factories
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
import ulid


@pytest.fixture
def correlation_id() -> str:
    """
    Generate a unique correlation ID for request tracing.
    
    Returns:
        ULID string for correlation tracking
    """
    return str(ulid.ULID())


@pytest.fixture
def mock_logger() -> MagicMock:
    """
    Provide a mock structured logger.
    
    Returns:
        MagicMock configured to accept structlog-style bind() and log methods
    """
    logger = MagicMock()
    logger.bind.return_value = logger
    return logger


@pytest.fixture
def mock_metadata_db() -> MagicMock:
    """
    Provide a mock metadata database connection.
    
    Returns:
        MagicMock configured with common DB operations
    """
    db = MagicMock()
    db.execute.return_value = MagicMock()
    db.commit.return_value = None
    db.rollback.return_value = None
    return db


@pytest.fixture
def mock_artifact_storage() -> MagicMock:
    """
    Provide a mock artifact storage interface.
    
    Returns:
        MagicMock implementing ArtifactStorage interface methods
    """
    storage = MagicMock()
    
    # Configure default behaviors
    storage.initialize.return_value = None
    storage.is_initialized.return_value = False
    storage.health_check.return_value = True
    storage.put.return_value = "artifacts/default.bin"
    storage.get.return_value = b"default content"
    storage.get_with_metadata.return_value = (b"default content", {})
    storage.list.return_value = []
    storage.delete.return_value = None
    
    return storage

from ulid import ULID

"""Service configuration contracts."""

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, field_validator
from typing import Literal


class LoggingConfig(BaseModel):
    """Logging configuration.
    
    Attributes:
        level: Log level (debug, info, warning, error, critical).
        format: Log format (json or text).
        output: Log output destination.
    """
    level: Literal["debug", "info", "warning", "error", "critical"] = Field(
        "info",
        description="Log level",
    )
    format: Literal["json", "text"] = Field("json", description="Log format")
    output: Literal["stdout", "stderr", "file"] = Field(
        "stdout",
        description="Log destination",
    )


class ServiceConfig(BaseModel):
    """Base service configuration.
    
    Attributes:
        service_name: Service identifier.
        environment: Deployment environment.
        debug: Enable debug mode.
        logging: Logging configuration.
    """
    service_name: str = Field(..., description="Service name")
    environment: Literal["development", "staging", "production"] = Field(
        "development",
        description="Deployment environment",
    )
    debug: bool = Field(False, description="Debug mode enabled")
    logging: LoggingConfig = Field(
        default_factory=LoggingConfig,
        description="Logging settings",
    )

    @field_validator("service_name")
    @classmethod
    def validate_service_name(cls, v: str) -> str:
        """Ensure service name is not empty."""
        if not v or not v.strip():
            raise ValueError("service_name must not be empty")
        return v.strip()

"""Base contracts for FXLab."""
from typing import Generic, TypeVar
from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict


class FXLabBaseModel(BaseModel):
    """Base model for all FXLab Pydantic models."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=False, validate_assignment=True)


T = TypeVar("T")


class APIResponse(BaseModel, Generic[T]):
    """Standard API response envelope."""
    success: bool
    data: T | None = None
    error: str | None = None

"""
Strategy Compiler interfaces package.

Contains abstract base classes (ports) for the strategy compiler subsystem.
Concrete implementations live in the parent package; tests depend only on
these interfaces, never on implementations.
"""

"""
Strategy IR interfaces package.

Contains abstract base classes (ports) for the strategy intermediate
representation subsystem. Concrete implementations live in the parent
package; tests depend only on these interfaces.
"""

"""
Experiment Plan interfaces package.

Contains abstract base classes (ports) for the experiment planning
subsystem. Concrete implementations live in the parent package; tests
depend only on these interfaces.
"""

"""
Risk interfaces package.

Contains abstract base classes (ports) for the risk management subsystem.
Concrete implementations live in the parent package; tests depend only on
these interfaces, never on implementations.
"""

"""
Mocks package for strategy_compiler.

In-memory fakes for unit-testing the strategy_compiler subsystem.
Concrete implementations must never be imported here.
"""

"""
Mocks package for strategy_ir.

In-memory fakes for unit-testing the strategy_ir subsystem.
Concrete implementations must never be imported here.
"""

"""
Mocks package for experiment_plan.

In-memory fakes for unit-testing the experiment_plan subsystem.
Concrete implementations must never be imported here.
"""

"""
Mocks package for risk.

In-memory fakes for unit-testing the risk subsystem.
Concrete implementations must never be imported here.
"""

"""FXLab contracts package.

Contains all Pydantic models, enums, and typed exceptions.
"""

"""Project-wide enumerations."""
from enum import Enum


class Environment(str, Enum):
    """Deployment environment."""
    LOCAL = "local"
    DEV = "dev"
    STAGING = "staging"
    PROD = "prod"

"""
Strategy domain contracts: compiler inputs, Strategy IR, and build artifacts.
"""
from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum
from typing import Any, Literal
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from ulid import ULID


class StrategyStatus(str, Enum):
    """Strategy build lifecycle status."""
    DRAFT = "draft"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    COMPILED = "compiled"
    PAPER_ELIGIBLE = "paper_eligible"
    ARCHIVED = "archived"


class UncertaintySeverity(str, Enum):
    """Classification of uncertainty impact."""
    INFORMATIONAL = "informational"
    MINOR = "minor"
    MATERIAL = "material"
    BLOCKING = "blocking"


class UncertaintyDimension(str, Enum):
    """Dimension of strategy uncertainty."""
    ENTRY_TIMING = "entry_timing"
    EXIT_TIMING = "exit_timing"
    POSITION_SIZING = "position_sizing"
    COST_MODEL = "cost_model"
    DATA_AVAILABILITY = "data_availability"
    PARAMETER_SENSITIVITY = "parameter_sensitivity"
    REGIME_DEPENDENCY = "regime_dependency"


class TemplateType(str, Enum):
    """Built-in strategy template types."""
    MEAN_REVERSION = "mean_reversion"
    TREND_FOLLOWING = "trend_following"
    BREAKOUT = "breakout"
    CARRY = "carry"
    CUSTOM = "custom"


class SignalType(str, Enum):
    """Signal generation method."""
    CROSSOVER = "crossover"
    THRESHOLD = "threshold"
    PATTERN = "pattern"
    COMPOSITE = "composite"


class TimeframeUnit(str, Enum):
    """Timeframe unit for bar intervals."""
    MINUTE = "minute"
    HOUR = "hour"
    DAY = "day"


class PositionSizingMethod(str, Enum):
    """Position sizing algorithm."""
    FIXED_UNITS = "fixed_units"
    FIXED_NOTIONAL = "fixed_notional"
    PERCENT_EQUITY = "percent_equity"
    VOLATILITY_TARGET = "volatility_target"
    KELLY_FRACTION = "kelly_fraction"


class StopType(str, Enum):
    """Stop loss type."""
    NONE = "none"
    FIXED_POINTS = "fixed_points"
    PERCENT = "percent"
    ATR_MULTIPLE = "atr_multiple"
    TRAILING = "trailing"


class LimitType(str, Enum):
    """Profit target type."""
    NONE = "none"
    FIXED_POINTS = "fixed_points"
    PERCENT = "percent"
    ATR_MULTIPLE = "atr_multiple"
    RISK_RATIO = "risk_ratio"


class FillAssumption(str, Enum):
    """Fill execution assumption."""
    ON_CLOSE = "on_close"
    NEXT_OPEN = "next_open"
    MARKET_IMPACT = "market_impact"


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Compiler Input Models
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class Timeframe(BaseModel):
    """Timeframe specification."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    unit: TimeframeUnit
    multiplier: int = Field(ge=1)


class StrategyConstraints(BaseModel):
    """Constraints that the compiler must enforce."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    max_concurrent_positions: int = Field(ge=1)
    max_leverage: float = Field(ge=1.0)
    allowed_symbols: list[str] | None = None
    forbidden_symbols: list[str] | None = None
    require_explicit_exits: bool = True
    require_stop_loss: bool = True
    require_profit_target: bool = False


class PositionSizingConfig(BaseModel):
    """Position sizing configuration."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    method: PositionSizingMethod
    value: float = Field(gt=0)
    max_position_size: float | None = Field(default=None, gt=0)
    min_position_size: float | None = Field(default=None, gt=0)


class StopLossConfig(BaseModel):
    """Stop loss configuration."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    type: StopType
    value: float | None = Field(default=None, gt=0)
    trailing_activation: float | None = Field(default=None, gt=0)


class ProfitTargetConfig(BaseModel):
    """Profit target configuration."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    type: LimitType
    value: float | None = Field(default=None, gt=0)


class RiskConfig(BaseModel):
    """Risk management configuration."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    position_sizing: PositionSizingConfig
    stop_loss: StopLossConfig
    profit_target: ProfitTargetConfig
    fill_assumption: FillAssumption = FillAssumption.NEXT_OPEN


class StrategyIntent(BaseModel):
    """
    Human-readable strategy description submitted for compilation.
    This is the primary input to the compiler.
    """
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    name: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=200)
    description: str
    template_type: TemplateType
    template_params: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)
    execution_timeframe: Timeframe
    signal_timeframes: list[Timeframe] = Field(min_length=1)
    constraints: StrategyConstraints
    risk_config: RiskConfig
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Strategy IR (Intermediate Representation)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class IRSignal(BaseModel):
    """Canonical signal definition in Strategy IR."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    signal_id: str
    signal_type: SignalType
    timeframe: Timeframe
    parameters: dict[str, Any]
    dependencies: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class IREntryRule(BaseModel):
    """Entry rule in Strategy IR."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    condition: str
    signal_refs: list[str]
    direction: Literal["long", "short"]


class IRExitRule(BaseModel):
    """Exit rule in Strategy IR."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    condition: str
    signal_refs: list[str]
    applies_to: Literal["long", "short", "both"]


class IRRiskManagement(BaseModel):
    """Risk management in Strategy IR."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    position_sizing: PositionSizingConfig
    stop_loss: StopLossConfig
    profit_target: ProfitTargetConfig
    fill_assumption: FillAssumption


class StrategyIR(BaseModel):
    """
    Deterministic intermediate representation of a compiled strategy.
    This is the output of the compiler and input to the research engine.
    """
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    strategy_build_id: str
    version: str = "1.0"
    canonical_name: str
    execution_timeframe: Timeframe
    signals: list[IRSignal]
    entry_rules: list[IREntryRule]
    exit_rules: list[IRExitRule]
    risk_management: IRRiskManagement
    constraints: StrategyConstraints
    compiled_at: datetime
    compiler_version: str


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Compiler Output Models
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class UncertaintyRecord(BaseModel):
    """Record of uncertainty identified during compilation."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    dimension: UncertaintyDimension
    severity: UncertaintySeverity
    description: str
    mitigation: str | None = None
    evidence_refs: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class AssumptionRecord(BaseModel):
    """Record of assumption made during compilation."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    category: str
    description: str
    rationale: str
    alternatives: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class CompilerEvidence(BaseModel):
    """Evidence artifact produced during compilation."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    evidence_type: str
    description: str
    artifact_id: str
    created_at: datetime


class CompilerBundle(BaseModel):
    """
    Complete output bundle from strategy compilation.
    Includes IR, uncertainty, assumptions, and evidence.
    """
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    strategy_build_id: str
    strategy_ir: StrategyIR
    uncertainties: list[UncertaintyRecord]
    assumptions: list[AssumptionRecord]
    evidence: list[CompilerEvidence]
    material_blockers: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    preflight_status: Literal["pending", "passed", "failed"] = "pending"
    compiled_at: datetime
    compiler_version: str


class StrategyBuildRecord(BaseModel):
    """
    Persistent record of a strategy build in the database.
    """
    strategy_build_id: str
    name: str
    status: StrategyStatus
    intent: StrategyIntent
    compiled_bundle: CompilerBundle | None = None
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime
    created_by: str
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)

"""
Research domain contracts: runs, trials, results, and execution.
"""
from datetime import date, datetime
from enum import Enum
from typing import Any, Literal
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict


class RunStatus(str, Enum):
    """Research run lifecycle status."""
    PENDING = "pending"
    PREFLIGHT_RUNNING = "preflight_running"
    PREFLIGHT_PASSED = "preflight_passed"
    PREFLIGHT_FAILED = "preflight_failed"
    RUNNING = "running"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    CANCELLED = "cancelled"


class TrialStatus(str, Enum):
    """Individual trial status."""
    PENDING = "pending"
    RUNNING = "running"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    PRUNED = "pruned"


class WindowType(str, Enum):
    """Time window designation."""
    TRAINING = "training"
    VALIDATION = "validation"
    HOLDOUT = "holdout"


class PreflightCheckType(str, Enum):
    """Preflight validation check category."""
    DATA_AVAILABILITY = "data_availability"
    PIT_SAFETY = "pit_safety"
    MULTI_TIMEFRAME_SAFETY = "multi_timeframe_safety"
    COST_PROFILE_VALIDITY = "cost_profile_validity"
    STRATEGY_IR_VALIDITY = "strategy_ir_validity"
    WINDOW_OVERLAP = "window_overlap"


class PreflightSeverity(str, Enum):
    """Preflight check result severity."""
    INFO = "info"
    WARNING = "warning"
    ERROR = "error"


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Research Run Configuration
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class TimeWindow(BaseModel):
    """Time window specification."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    window_type: WindowType
    start_date: date
    end_date: date
    contaminated: bool = False


class DatasetReference(BaseModel):
    """Reference to a certified dataset version."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    dataset_version_id: str
    symbol: str
    timeframe: str


class CostProfileReference(BaseModel):
    """Reference to a versioned cost profile."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    cost_profile_id: str
    version: str


class ResearchRunConfig(BaseModel):
    """
    Configuration for a deterministic research run.
    """
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    run_id: str
    strategy_build_id: str
    datasets: list[DatasetReference]
    cost_profile: CostProfileReference
    windows: list[TimeWindow]
    initial_capital: float = Field(gt=0)
    seed: int
    compute_policy_id: str | None = None
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Preflight Validation
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class PreflightCheck(BaseModel):
    """Individual preflight validation check result."""
    check_type: PreflightCheckType
    severity: PreflightSeverity
    passed: bool
    message: str
    details: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)


class PreflightReport(BaseModel):
    """
    Preflight validation report.
    Must pass before run is admitted to execution.
    """
    run_id: str
    checks: list[PreflightCheck]
    passed: bool
    executed_at: datetime
    duration_seconds: float


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Trial and Results
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class TrialConfig(BaseModel):
    """Configuration for a single trial within a run."""
    model_config = ConfigDict(frozen=True)

    trial_id: str
    run_id: str
    trial_number: int
    parameters: dict[str, Any]


class PerformanceMetrics(BaseModel):
    """Performance metrics for a trial or window."""
    total_return: float
    sharpe_ratio: float | None = None
    max_drawdown: float
    win_rate: float
    profit_factor: float | None = None
    total_trades: int
    avg_trade_return: float | None = None
    volatility: float | None = None


class TrialResult(BaseModel):
    """Result of a completed trial."""
    trial_id: str
    status: TrialStatus
    parameters: dict[str, Any]
    metrics: PerformanceMetrics
    window_metrics: dict[str, PerformanceMetrics] = Field(default_factory=dict)
    artifact_refs: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    completed_at: datetime
    duration_seconds: float


class ResearchRunResult(BaseModel):
    """Aggregated result of a research run."""
    run_id: str
    strategy_build_id: str
    status: RunStatus
    trials: list[TrialResult]
    best_trial_id: str | None = None
    artifact_refs: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    completed_at: datetime | None = None
    duration_seconds: float | None = None
    error_message: str | None = None


# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Trade and Position Records
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


class TradeRecord(BaseModel):
    """Record of a single simulated trade."""
    trade_id: str
    trial_id: str
    symbol: str
    direction: Literal["long", "short"]
    entry_time: datetime
    entry_price: float
    entry_size: float
    exit_time: datetime | None = None
    exit_price: float | None = None
    exit_reason: str | None = None
    realized_pnl: float | None = None
    commission: float
    slippage: float
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)


class PositionSnapshot(BaseModel):
    """Snapshot of portfolio state at a point in time."""
    trial_id: str
    timestamp: datetime
    equity: float
    cash: float
    positions: dict[str, float]  # symbol -> size
    unrealized_pnl: float

"""Enums for the FXLab project."""

from enum import Enum


class FeedLifecycleStatus(str, Enum):
    """Lifecycle status for data feeds from Phase 1."""
    
    PENDING = "pending"
    ACTIVE = "active"
    DEPRECATED = "deprecated"
    RETIRED = "retired"

"""Strategy compiler interface definitions."""

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any

from libs.contracts.strategy import StrategyDefinition


class IStrategyCompiler(ABC):
    """Compiles strategy definitions into executable IR."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def compile(self, definition: StrategyDefinition) -> Any:
        """Compile a strategy definition to IR."""
        ...


class IStrategyValidator(ABC):
    """Validates strategy definitions before compilation."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def validate(self, definition: StrategyDefinition) -> bool:
        """Validate a strategy definition."""
        ...


__all__ = [
    "IStrategyCompiler",
    "IStrategyValidator",
]

"""Experiment planning interface definitions."""

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any

from libs.contracts.research import ExperimentPlan


class IExperimentPlanner(ABC):
    """Plans research experiments with parameter ranges."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def plan(self, parameters: dict[str, Any]) -> ExperimentPlan:
        """Create an experiment plan."""
        ...


class IExperimentValidator(ABC):
    """Validates experiment plans before execution."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def validate(self, plan: ExperimentPlan) -> bool:
        """Validate an experiment plan."""
        ...


__all__ = [
    "IExperimentPlanner",
    "IExperimentValidator",
]

"""Strategy IR interface definitions."""

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any


class IStrategyIRBuilder(ABC):
    """Builds strategy IR from compiled output."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def build(self, compiled_output: Any) -> Any:
        """Build IR from compiled strategy."""
        ...


class IStrategyIRExecutor(ABC):
    """Executes strategy IR against market data."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def execute(self, ir: Any, data: Any) -> Any:
        """Execute strategy IR."""
        ...


class IStrategyIRSerializer(ABC):
    """Serializes/deserializes strategy IR."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def serialize(self, ir: Any) -> bytes:
        """Serialize IR to bytes."""
        ...

    @abstractmethod
    async def deserialize(self, data: bytes) -> Any:
        """Deserialize bytes to IR."""
        ...


__all__ = [
    "IStrategyIRBuilder",
    "IStrategyIRExecutor",
    "IStrategyIRSerializer",
]

"""Risk management interface definitions."""

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Any


class IRiskCalculator(ABC):
    """Calculates risk metrics for positions and portfolios."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def calculate_var(self, positions: Any, confidence: Decimal) -> Decimal:
        """Calculate Value at Risk."""
        ...

    @abstractmethod
    async def calculate_drawdown(self, equity_curve: list[Decimal]) -> Decimal:
        """Calculate maximum drawdown."""
        ...


class IPositionSizer(ABC):
    """Determines position sizes based on risk parameters."""

    @abstractmethod
    async def calculate_size(
        self,
        account_equity: Decimal,
        risk_per_trade: Decimal,
        stop_distance: Decimal,
    ) -> Decimal:
        """Calculate position size."""
        ...


__all__ = [
    "IRiskCalculator",
    "IPositionSizer",
]

"""Health check endpoint."""
from fastapi import APIRouter
from libs.contracts.health import HealthCheckResponse, ServiceStatus
import structlog

logger = structlog.get_logger(__name__)

router = APIRouter(tags=["health"])


@router.get("/health", response_model=HealthCheckResponse)
async def health_check() -> HealthCheckResponse:
    """Return API health status."""
    logger.debug("health_check.entry")
    
    response = HealthCheckResponse(
        status=ServiceStatus.HEALTHY,
        service="api",
        version="0.1.0"
    )
    
    logger.debug("health_check.exit", status=response.status)
    return response

"""Health check contracts."""
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class HealthStatus(str, Enum):
    """Health status enumeration."""
    HEALTHY = "healthy"
    DEGRADED = "degraded"
    UNHEALTHY = "unhealthy"


class ComponentHealth(BaseModel):
    """Health status of a single component."""
    name: str = Field(..., description="Component name")
    status: HealthStatus = Field(..., description="Component status")
    message: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="Optional status message")
    details: Optional[dict] = Field(None, description="Optional status details")


class HealthResponse(BaseModel):
    """Overall health check response."""
    status: HealthStatus = Field(..., description="Overall service status")
    service: str = Field(..., description="Service name")
    version: str = Field(..., description="Service version")
    components: list[ComponentHealth] = Field(
        default_factory=list,
        description="Health status of individual components"
    )

"""
FastAPI application entry point.
Canonical entry point - never rename to app.py.
"""
import structlog
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

from libs.contracts.correlation import correlation_id_middleware

logger = structlog.get_logger()

app = FastAPI(
    title="FXLab API",
    description="Analytical engine for FX strategy research",
    version="0.1.0",
)

# Add CORS middleware
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Add correlation ID middleware
app.middleware("http")(correlation_id_middleware)


@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    """Health check endpoint."""
    logger.info("health_check.called")
    return {"status": "healthy"}


@app.on_event("startup")
async def startup_event():
    """Application startup."""
    logger.info("api.startup")


@app.on_event("shutdown")
async def shutdown_event():
    """Application shutdown."""
    logger.info("api.shutdown")

# -- merged from services/api/app.py --
# This file should not exist - delete it
# The canonical FastAPI entry point is services/api/main.py

"""Research domain contracts."""
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Any

from pydantic import Field

from libs.contracts.base import FXLabBaseModel
from libs.contracts.enums import ResearchPhase


class ExperimentPlan(FXLabBaseModel):
    """Plan for a research experiment."""
    
    plan_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of this plan")
    strategy_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of strategy being researched")
    name: str = Field(..., description="Experiment name")
    description: str | None = Field(None, description="Experiment description")
    
    # Experiment parameters stored as flexible dict
    parameters: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict, description="Experiment parameters")
    
    phase: ResearchPhase = Field(ResearchPhase.PLANNING, description="Current phase")
    created_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)


class ResearchRun(FXLabBaseModel):
    """A single research run execution."""
    
    run_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of this run")
    plan_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of parent experiment plan")
    strategy_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of strategy")
    
    phase: ResearchPhase = Field(..., description="Research phase")
    
    # Run configuration stored as flexible dict
    config: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict, description="Run configuration")
    
    started_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)
    completed_at: datetime | None = Field(None, description="Completion timestamp")
    success: bool = Field(False, description="Whether run succeeded")


class ResearchResult(FXLabBaseModel):
    """Results from a research run."""
    
    result_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of this result")
    run_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of parent run")
    
    # Results stored as flexible dict
    metrics: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict, description="Performance metrics")
    artifacts: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list, description="ULIDs of result artifacts")
    
    created_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)


class ResearchRequest(FXLabBaseModel):
    """Request to start research."""
    
    plan_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of experiment plan")
    correlation_id: str | None = Field(None, description="Request correlation ID")


class ResearchResponse(FXLabBaseModel):
    """Response from research request."""
    
    run_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of started run")
    plan_id: str = Field(..., description="ULID of experiment plan")
    success: bool = Field(..., description="Whether request succeeded")
    error_message: str | None = Field(None, description="Error message if failed")
